text:
(No longer used: 
07/01/2014, use code P5) 

222 = Exceeds the contracted maximum number of hours/days/units by this provider for this period. 
This is not patient specific. Usage: Refer to the 835-healthcare policy identification segment 
(loop 2110 service payment information REF) if present 

223 = Adjustment code for mandated federal, state or local law/regulation that is not already covered 
by another code and is mandated before a new code can be created 

225 = Penalty or interest
